legal.reviewPending: Legal copy is pending legal review. This page is a bilingual product-link shell and is not final legal advice.

metadata.title: OptiCloud — Optimization and Forecasting Cloud
metadata.description: Production-grade optimization and forecasting APIs for business engineers

hero.title: Optimization APIs for business engineers
hero.subtitle: Run Gurobi- and TimeGPT-class workflows in minutes, without rebuilding research tooling
hero.body: Most mid-market teams still run planning from spreadsheets. OptiCloud gives them a direct API path to optimization and forecasting workloads that used to require expensive specialist platforms.

hello.title: Run your first LP solve in 3 minutes
hello.snippet:
# 1. Sign up with phone + email
curl -X POST https://api.opticloud.cn/v1/auth/signup \
  -d '{"phone":"+86138...","email":"you@example.com","age_years":18}'

# 2. Use the generated sk-xxx API key:
curl -X POST https://api.opticloud.cn/v1/optimizations \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-xxx" \
  -H "Idempotency-Key: $(uuidgen)" \
  -d '{"task_type":"lp","minimize":{"c":[1,1]},"st":{"A":[[1,1]],"b":[10]}}'

# Response includes the optimum and transparent model_version metadata.

landing.footer: OptiCloud · M0 Sprint 0 · J1 Vertical Slice (Story 1.1a + 1.1b)

wizard.title: 5 steps to Hello World
wizard.description: Create an account, verify it, generate an API key, import Postman, and run the first LP.
wizard.supportDescription: Keep filling the form, open the quickstart, or finish later.

form.title: Sign up for OptiCloud
form.subtitle: Get an API key in 3 minutes and run Hello World
form.phoneHint: Use E.164 international format, for example +8613800138000.
form.emailHint: .edu / .ac.cn emails activate the academic tier automatically.
form.ageHint: Enter age in full years only. Users under 14 cannot register; ages 14-17 require guardian confirmation.
form.guardianEmailHint: The account and API key are not created until guardian confirmation is complete.
form.guardianDescription: A confirmation email was sent to {email}. Local development can use the confirmation code below.
form.termsPrefix: By signing up, you agree to the

wizard.title: 5 steps to Hello World
wizard.description: You are now on the API key, Postman, and first LP solve stages.
wizard.supportDescription: Continue the guide, open the quickstart, or try again later. This prompt does not block the page.

hero.title: Welcome to OptiCloud
hero.description: Your first API key has been generated. Run the LP demo here or copy the cURL command to your terminal.

solve.title: Run an LP solve in-browser
solve.description: Scenario: delivery assignment LP with two vehicles and three customers. Minimize the total delivery cost.

modal.title: Signup complete — run Hello World now
modal.description: Copy the cURL command to your terminal or run the LP demo on this page.
modal.apiKeyWarning: This API key is shown only once. Copy and store it now.

next.title: Next
next.quickstart: Open the full Hello World quickstart

quickstart.title: Hello World Quickstart
quickstart.description: Use this quick reference to resume API key setup, Postman import, and your first LP solve.

apiKey.title: 1. Copy the API key
apiKey.body: Save the full API key on the welcome page. It is shown once; later views only show a masked prefix.

postman.title: 2. Import Postman
postman.body: Click Import Postman in the signup success modal, then import the collection into your Postman workspace.

lp.title: 3. Run the first LP
lp.body: Return to the welcome page and click Run LP solve. When the result appears, the wizard marks Hello World complete.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: v1 pricing shell: plans start from ¥6 per month, and academic emails receive an automatic education tier. Full commercial packaging will be published after legal and billing policy review.

plans.starter: Starter: signup grants baseline Credits for the first LP or forecasting task.
plans.academic: Academic: .edu / .ac.cn emails activate education-tier Credits automatically.
plans.api: API: tasks consume Credits; failed and cancelled refund rules are completed by later billing stories.

privacy.body: OptiCloud Privacy Policy content is pending legal review. Current signup, age declaration, and account deletion flows follow data minimization.
